title: BP-C4 Visual Review Runtime Decision
goal: Decide the safe BP-C4 runtime boundary for DiffLens and Browser Preview before visual-review implementation continues.
prior_task_findings: BP-098 defines the BP-C4 entry gate and limits BP-C4 to DiffLens and Browser Preview.
success_criteria: DiffLens and Browser Preview responsibilities are separated.
Browser Preview does not claim browser automation before a local target exists.
hard_stop_conditions: Any runtime code is changed in BP-099.
Any UI evidence is claimed without an actual UI target.
